title: monticalia perijaensis
intro: Monticalia perijaensis, a species of flowering plant in the daisy and sunflower family, is native to the Perija mountain range in Venezuela. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating gastrointestinal issues. The leaves and stems of Monticalia perijaensis can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
